title: RPSC – Assistant Prosecution Officer – 371 Posts
applyMode: Online only (via SSO Portal + RPSC website)
shortInfo: RPSC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 371 vacancies for Assistant Prosecution Officer posts. Candidates can apply online only from 08.06.2026 to 07.07.2026 through RPSC website rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: RPSC APO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 371 Posts
basic_details.short_information: RPSC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 371 vacancies for Assistant Prosecution Officer posts. Candidates can apply online only from 08.06.2026 to 07.07.2026 through RPSC website rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: OTR is Blocked (online applications cannot be submitted)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via SSO Portal + RPSC website)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- for any amendments within prescribed period

age_limit.age_details: Two chances to appear before Commission/Appointing Authority

qualification.education_qualification: Candidate who has not darkened any circle in more than 10% of questions shall be disqualified

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Level L-11 (Grade Pay Rs. 4,200/-); Fixed monthly pay as per State Government norms

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates must complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO portal and read the detailed guidelines and instructions for applicants available on the RPSC website.
seo_tags: Rajasthan Public Service Commission Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026
